response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and full-stack development. His recent work at re:cinq directly involves AI-driven code production, and his experience with high-throughput systems (e.g., at Dunnhumby media) and technical strategy (e.g., at Altom Consulting) is highly relevant. While his exposure to AI-native environments is recent, his operational ownership and stakeholder management skills are well-evidenced.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., Dunnhumby media, Optilyz).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and code generation tools (re:cinq).
Proven operational ownership and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., agile ceremonies, on-call rotations at multiple roles).
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Python proficiency, a must-have skill for the role.
No direct evidence of prior Staff-level technical strategy ownership (e.g., domain-wide decisions).
Recent AI-native experience (re:cinq) is brief, though promising.
